title: rubus lejeunei subsp. subcylindricus
intro: Rubus lejeunei subsp. subcylindricus, also known as a wild raspberry species, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rubus genus, characterized by its thorny canes and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus lejeunei subsp. subcylindricus include its high content of antioxidants, which help to protect against cell damage and inflammation, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus lejeunei subsp. subcylindricus include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, certain cancers, and cognitive decline, as well as its ability to support digestive health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus lejeunei subsp. subcylindricus can be made into teas, jams, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
